title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd
company: Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Gurgaon team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
